typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DestinationTable as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	CustomerDestinationPath as string (),
	FTPCustomerDestinationPath as string (),
	ParentPackageExecutionId as integer ()
}

source(output(
		id as integer,
		firstName as string,
		lastName as string,
		phone as string,
		company as string,
		email as string,
		customerGroupId as integer,
		taxExemptCategory as string,
		dateCreated as timestamp,
		dateModified as timestamp,
		erpCustomerNumber as string,
		erpBranchSystem as string,
		erpLinkedBranch as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> CustomersCSV
CustomersCSV derive(id = id) ~> PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError
CustomersCSV derive() ~> CustomersCSVErrorReformat
PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError derive(ETLCreateDate = currentDate(),
		ETLExecutionID = $User__PackageExecutionID,
		SourceSystemId = $Project__SourceSystemId) ~> AddDerivedColumns
CustomersCSVErrorReformat derive() ~> CustomersCSV0
AddDerivedColumns sink(input(
		customerGroupId as integer,
		erpCustomerNumber as string,
		ETLCreateDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		lastName as string,
		taxExemptCategory as string,
		dateModified as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		erpLinkedBranch as string,
		SourceSystemId as integer,
		firstName as string,
		erpBranchSystem as string,
		dateCreated as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		phone as string,
		ETLExecutionId as long,
		company as string,
		id as integer,
		email as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		customerGroupId,
		erpCustomerNumber,
		ETLCreateDate,
		lastName,
		taxExemptCategory,
		dateModified,
		erpLinkedBranch,
		SourceSystemId,
		firstName,
		erpBranchSystem,
		dateCreated,
		phone,
		ETLExecutionId = ETLExecutionID,
		company,
		id,
		email)) ~> CustomersTable
CustomersCSV0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> CustomersCSVERROROUTPUTFILE
